metadata.name: Server & Network - Investigate High Server CPU

description: An RMM alert indicates a client's remote desktop server has had sustained 100% CPU usage for over an hour.

nodes.task_description: Connect to the server and open Task Manager to view running processes.
Identify a specific user's session and a particular application process that is consuming all the CPU.

expected_outcome.value: A 'runaway' process is identified as the root cause.

nodes.task_description: End the runaway process and contact the user to inform them.

expected_outcome.value: Server CPU usage returns to normal, and the issue is resolved.
